_README: This week's recording config. The 'sessions' array can hold ANY number of videos — add as many as you upload. Each becomes its own numbered video card. Paste each video's YouTube ID into 'youtube' (the part after watch?v=). Leave 'youtube' blank for a session not uploaded yet. Then run build-recordings.py.

_fields.youtube: YouTube video ID only (after watch?v=). Blank = not uploaded yet
_fields.title: Session title
_fields._note: Add or remove objects in 'sessions' to control how many video cards appear.

title: Cloud Foundations
subtitle: S3 · EC2 · IAM basics

sessions.title: Cloud Concepts & S3
sessions.topics: What the cloud really is, regions & AZs, hands-on S3 + static hosting
